generated_oml:
instance ResearchLabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Controlled research laboratory environment for the gantry crane system"
    base:contains StructuralFrame, HoistMechanism, Trolley, ControllerUnit
]

instance StructuralFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance HoistMechanism : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hoist mechanism component of the gantry crane"
]

instance Trolley : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Trolley component of the gantry crane"
]

instance ControllerUnit : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller unit of the gantry crane"
]

instance GantryCraneSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors integrated in the lab-scale gantry crane for real-time data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GantryCraneSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance GantryCraneSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "MQTT-transmitted data from gantry crane sensors"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GantryCraneSensor
]

instance OperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational state data from gantry crane sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GantryCraneSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, C4PythonModules
]

instance GantryCraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model for geometric representation of the gantry crane structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360
]

instance KinematicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematics model for simulating motion dynamics of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]

instance C4ArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 model for system architecture visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo C4PythonModules
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization for TimescaleDB database"
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time-series database for operational data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance MosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard for interactive data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveDataVisualizationService
]

instance Fusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 for CAD model creation"
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Capella tool for system modeling"
]

instance KiCad : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "KiCad for electronics design"
]

instance C4PythonModules : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python modules for C4 architecture visualization"
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control service for motion trajectory optimization of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for logging operational state records to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalyticsInsight
]

instance InteractiveDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive service for real-time and historical monitoring via dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for ensuring synchronization accuracy between physical and digital states, including fault detection and predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeValidationInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation for container movement"
]

instance RealTimeValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous validation via real-time sensor data monitoring"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization enabling operators to take appropriate actions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics supporting logistics operations decision-making"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands are sent from the Control Application (Python) through the Physical Crane Interface to the physical crane. Command types, message formats, validation mechanisms, and execution confirmations are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture is visualized using the C4 Model with context and container diagrams, employing containerization technologies for deployment and an ad-hoc approach without a commercial digital twin framework."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT is utilized for signaling between digital twin services. Network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, and security protocols are not described in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a single personal computer (on-premise), with the Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard containers containerized using Docker. All software components run on this local machine, as the physical crane is connected directly to the computer and all system services execute locally."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Lab Scale Gantry Crane system adheres to the C4 Model standard for architectural visualization, employing context and container diagrams to describe its software architecture."
]
